    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    B

    BAR_HEIGHT - Static variable in class component.scene2.HealthBar
     
    BAR_HEIGHT - Static variable in class component.scene2.SkillBar
    Fixed height for the skill bar in pixels.
    BAR_WIDTH - Static variable in class component.scene2.HealthBar
     
    BAR_WIDTH - Static variable in class component.scene2.SkillBar
    Fixed width for the skill bar in pixels.
    Barista - Class in logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters
    Barista hybrid character that throws coffee projectiles with slight arc and knockback.
    Barista() - Constructor for class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Barista
    Creates Barista with default hybrid stats.
    Barista(int, int, int, int, float) - Constructor for class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Barista
    Creates Barista with custom stats.
    BaseProjectileAttack - Class in logic.entity
    Generic projectile model used by ranged/hybrid attacks.
    BaseProjectileAttack(int, float, int, float, float, float, float, Player, Image, float) - Constructor for class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Creates a projectile instance with sprite and movement properties.
    bgmPlayer - Static variable in class logic.audio.AudioManager
    Active background music player instance.
    bgmVolume - Static variable in class logic.audio.AudioManager
    Global BGM volume in range [0.0, 1.0].
    BLOWER_DURATION - Static variable in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Bubble
    Duration blower visual remains visible.
    blowerStartTime - Variable in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Bubble
    Timestamp when blower visual was shown.
    Bubble - Class in logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters
    Bubble ranged character that emits multiple bubble projectiles per shot.
    Bubble() - Constructor for class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Bubble
    Creates Bubble with tuned stats and weapon sprite.
    bubblePops - Static variable in class logic.audio.AudioManager
    Bubble-pop sound pool used for random variation playback.
    buff - Variable in class logic.entity.Character
    Buff magnitude used by special skills.
    buffText - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    UI text showing skill buff activation feedback.
